tasks.label: Start Looker MCP (NPX)
tasks.command: lsof -t -i:5000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; LOOKER_BASE_URL=https://63d8480f-f779-43e6-b043-34fbb61a06e6.looker.app LOOKER_USE_CLIENT_OAUTH=true npx @toolbox-sdk/server --prebuilt=looker,looker-dev --mcp-prm-file ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/mcp-prm.json --toolbox-url http://127.0.0.1:5000/mcp
